title: Preserve deterministic classification integrity
description: Classification outcomes, evidence, validation reports, and accounting totals must remain reproducible for one exact Evaluation Fingerprint.
target: 100% of repeated evaluations and candidate validations with identical fingerprints return semantically identical ordered results; 100% of eligible or corpus rows are accounted for exactly once; zero incompatible-category matches produce a selected category.
load_condition: Every supported rule predicate, normalization version, outcome type, category lifecycle state, and representative or generated transaction projection.
measurement: Golden-fixture replay, property-based rule overlap tests, row-accounting assertions, and fingerprint-change negative tests.
rationale: Determinism is the safety property that makes rule behavior reviewable and repeatable.
